summary: Frontend-only testing of refactored TenantsPage.js (657→341 lines) with extracted TenantRow, CurrentFutureTab, and PastTenantsTab components. All 10 features verified working correctly.

issues: Console hydration warnings about span elements inside table elements - caused by React dev tools injection, not actual code issue

critical_code_review_comments: TenantsPage.js successfully refactored from 657 to 341 lines
TenantRow.js: TenantCurrentRow and TenantPastRow components work correctly with proper badges (Airbnb/VRBO, Pending)
CurrentFutureTab.js: Property groups expand/collapse correctly, shows occupancy counts, Future Tenants toggle works
PastTenantsTab.js: Both sort modes (By Unit, By Move-Out Date) work correctly with proper hierarchy
tenantUtils.js: Table constants (thClass, tdClass, columns, renderTableHeader) properly shared across components
All data-testid attributes properly set for testing
Tab badges show correct counts (7 current+future, 4 past)
passed_tests: Tenants page loads at /tenants with Current & Future tab showing property groups (2 properties found)
Tenants page: Clicking property group expands to show tenant table with columns (Unit, Tenant Name, Move In, Move Out, Monthly Rent, Notes, Actions)
Tenants page: Tenant rows show name, dates, rent, notes, and action buttons (edit/delete)
Tenants page: Edit button opens TenantFormDialog with pre-filled data
Tenants page: Past Tenants tab shows with sort toggle (By Unit / By Move-Out Date)
Tenants page: Past By Unit view shows property->unit->tenant hierarchy with expand/collapse
Tenants page: Past By Move-Out Date view groups tenants by quarter (Jan-Mar '26)
Tenants page: Add Tenant button opens form dialog
Tenants page: Clicking a tenant row opens detail dialog with full tenant info
Tenants page: Tab badges show correct counts (7 for current+future, 4 for past tenants)
Tenants page: Future Tenants toggle expands to show future tenant (Jonathen)
Tenants page: Pending moveout buttons (OK) visible for 3 tenants with past move-out dates
Tenants page: Airbnb/VRBO badges display correctly on tenant rows
context_for_next_testing_agent: TenantsPage refactoring verified. Key data-testids: tenants-page, tenants-create-button, tenants-tabs, tab-current-future, tab-past, current-future-table, past-tenants-table, property-group-{id}, property-toggle-{id}, tenants-table-row, tenant-edit-button, tenant-delete-button, confirm-moveout-button, future-toggle-{unitId}, past-sort-by-unit, past-sort-by-moveout, past-property-group-{id}, past-property-toggle-{id}, past-unit-toggle-{unitId}, quarter-group-{key}, quarter-toggle-{key}. Components extracted: TenantCurrentRow, TenantPastRow, CurrentFutureTab, PastTenantsTab, tenantUtils.
